creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some plist problems:

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: man/man3/%%AP_NAME%%::bufr.3pm.gz
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%-1.56-apache.conf
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/local/ports/science/metaf2xml
[blaviken@~/ports/science/metaf2xml]% make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for metaf2xml-1.56:
     APACHE=on: Install Apache config file for metaf2xml (depends on Apache)
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

Second one occurs only when APACHE=on.
